visual_description: A young man with round glasses and a brown jacket stands in a dim, misty stone corridor with arched windows. Two figures walk down a dark hallway, one holding a large unfolded map that is illuminated by blue light. A close‑up shows a hand pointing at a diagram on the map labeled "Harry Potter" and "The Great Hall".
audio_description: A frustrated voice is heard, then a quieter voice indicates a location on the map.
